name: Self-Regulated Reading with AI Support: An Eight-Week Study with Students
summary: arXiv:2602.09907v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: College students increasingly use AI chatbots to support academic reading, yet we lack granular understanding of how these interactions sha...
description: arXiv:2602.09907v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: College students increasingly use AI chatbots to support academic reading, yet we lack granular understanding of how these interactions shape their reading experience and cognitive engagement. We conducted an eight-week longitudinal study with 15 undergraduates who used AI to support assigned readings in a course. We collected 838 prompt...
author: Yue Fu, Joel Wester, Niels Van Berkel, Alexis Hiniker
